subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Personal identity of the devil is not true. God could not have created evil. Timothy 1 was written by bishops.
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @free will and predestination; fate, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @Satan; the Evil One
